description: Response body (201 Created) for POST /v1/lane/{finding_id}/propose — submits a remediation proposal for a delegated finding. The proposal is created in the autonomous_proposals table and the finding's status transitions. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class LaneProposeResponse.

proposal_id.description: The created proposal identifier. Use GET /v1/proposals/{proposal_id} to track execution.

status.description: Initial status of the created proposal. 'draft' requires further validation; 'pending' awaits approval; 'approved' is immediately executable.

approval_required.description: Whether human approval is required before the proposal will execute. Derived from risk tier.

scope_files.description: Repo-relative file paths included in the proposal's scope. Callers can use this to review what will be modified before approving.
